# zolix.ai llms.txt

- [Cloud Cost Optimization](https://zolix.ai): The #1 Private AI-Powered Cloud FinOps Platform.
- [Cloud FinOps](https://zolix.ai/cloud-finops): Automated cost allocation and visibility across multi-cloud.
- [AI FinOps](https://zolix.ai/ai-finops): Specialized financial management for LLM workloads.
- [GPU Calculator](https://zolix.ai/gpu-cost): Real-time pricing and performance estimation for NVIDIA/AMD.
- [ZOLIX Knowledge Library](https://zolix.ai/blog): Insights on cloud financial management and FinOps best practices.
- [Sovereign AI C2O](https://zolix.ai/products): 9B Parameter model trained on 2M+ data points.
